subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto them that have believed in God and His signs, and were among those who are guided by His verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من العبد الی الذینهم آمنوا بالله و آیاته و کانوا من الذینهم بایات الله لمهتدین
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @rejection, opposition and persecution
